Notes:
Integrates to MARs, Access DB that we pull data out of... ISC supports MARS, ITD - ETL scripts pulls records from   ITDNAS-ERAppl-Mineral Rights-TLE Land Claims-Backend-TLELandClaimsBackend.accdb

Treaty Land Entitlements.

Land Claims GIS Mapping Description
TLE lands are currently stored in a Land Claims Microsoft Access Database and these tables of land are very important business area to Lands and Mineral Tenure.  There is a nightly script that ITD runs that picks up the latest land entries and updates the Land Claims feature class that is an active feature class in the GeoAtlas, MARS, IRIS (via REST service) and EGIS.  The Business Area that enters new data daily is Mineral Rights, LMT
